task_completion.description: Verify the campaign name, type, and status are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SuiteCRM campaign creation or detail view showing the Name field as 'Q3 Industrial Equipment Launch', the Type dropdown as 'Email', and the Status dropdown as 'Planning'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign description is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Description text area containing exactly: 'Email campaign announcing new industrial equipment product line to wholesale distribution partners for Q3 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the start and end dates are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Start Date field showing '07/01/2025' (or '2025-07-01') and the End Date field showing '09/30/2025' (or '2025-09-30').

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign budget is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Budget field showing '15000' or '15,000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the campaign detail view (read-only mode, not edit mode) displaying the newly created campaign with the correct details, indicating the 'Save' button was clicked.

task_completion.description: Verify the target list 'Q3 Industrial Partners' is associated with the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a subpanel, relationship section, or target list selection area in the SuiteCRM campaign view showing 'Q3 Industrial Partners' linked to the 'Q3 Industrial Equipment Launch' campaign.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM web application open in a web browser, not terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into fields, selecting from dropdowns, or navigating the SuiteCRM interface naturally.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The campaign details must be visible within the SuiteCRM application fields, not in a notepad, terminal, or text editor window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Campaign Name: 'Q3 Industrial Equipment Launch'. Expected Type: 'Email'. Expected Budget: 15000. Expected Start Date: '07/01/2025' (or '2025-07-01'). Expected End Date: '09/30/2025' (or '2025-09-30'). Expected Status: 'Planning'. Expected Target List: 'Q3 Industrial Partners'. Expected Description: 'Email campaign announcing new industrial equipment product line to wholesale distribution partners for Q3 2025'.
